coreValues.sectionSubtitle: The foundational values that shape XanhStay
coreValues.trustDesc: All room information is verified, ensuring accuracy and reliability.
coreValues.greenDesc: Towards eco-friendly and sustainable living spaces for the community.
coreValues.communityDesc: Connecting landlords and tenants in a safe, mutually supportive ecosystem.
coreValues.innovationDesc: Applying modern technology for a fast and convenient room-finding experience.
coreValues.serviceDesc: Always listening and accompanying customers with a professional, dedicated attitude.
coreValues.intuitiveDesc: Intuitive interface and interactive maps make finding rooms easy in just a few steps.
